    def test_lifecycle_probe_reports_clean_reuse(lifecycle_result: dict) -> None:
        assert lifecycle_result["sample"] == SAMPLE
        assert lifecycle_result["generation1_output"] == GENERATION_ONE_OUTPUT

        assert lifecycle_result["latest_output"] == LATEST_OUTPUT
        assert lifecycle_result["generation1_threads"] == ["textd-worker-1", "textd-worker-2"]
        assert lifecycle_result["latest_threads"] == ["textd-worker-1", "textd-worker-2"]
        assert lifecycle_result["same_threads_reused"] is True
        assert lifecycle_result["pending_retirements_before_shutdown"] == 0
